protein_name: Belongs to the peptidase M10A family. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Molecular Function: endopeptidase activity; hydrolase activity; metal ion binding; metalloendopeptidase activity; metallopeptidase activity; peptidase activity; zinc ion binding
raw_fields.Biological Process: cellular response to UV-A; collagen catabolic process; extracellular matrix organization; positive regulation of protein-containing complex assembly; proteolysis
raw_fields.Alt. Names/Synonyms: collagenase-like B; Interstitial collagenase B; matrix metallopeptidase 1b (interstitial collagenase); matrix metalloproteinase 1b (interstitial collagenase); Matrix metalloproteinase-1b; Mcol; Mcol-B; McolB; MMP-1b; Mmp1b
raw_fields.Basal Isoelectric point: 5.05 Predict pI for various phosphorylation states
